title: Kairi Murg
description: A Hyderabadi mango chicken dish made with green chillies, spices and raw mango.

ingredients.name: raw mangoes, stoned and cut into small pieces

steps: Heat about 30 ml of oil in a large, heavy-based pan over medium heat, add the chicken pieces and stir-fry for about 8–10 minutes, or until they are evenly browned all over.
Add the chillies and turmeric with 250 ml water and bring to the boil. Reduce the heat and simmer for about 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Put the chilli powder in a small bowl, add 15 ml water and mix together.
Heat the remaining oil in another pan over medium heat, add the onions and stir-fry for about 4 minutes, or until light brown.
Add the ginger and garlic pastes and chilli powder mixture and season with salt, then fry for a further 2 minutes.
Reduce the heat to low, cover and cook for 3 minutes to let the spices blend well.
Add the chicken and the raw mango and cook over low heat for about 10 minutes, then remove from the heat and adjust the seasoning, if necessary.
